title: aloe distans var. depressa
intro: Aloe distans var. depressa is a succulent plant species within the Aloe genus, characterized by its depressed or flat leaves with white or pale yellow spots or stripes. The medicinal properties of Aloe distans var. depressa are attributed to its high content of aloin and other anthraquinone glycosides, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe burns, wounds, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Aloe distans var. depressa can be found in the form of gels, creams, and ointments, often used topically to promote wound healing and skin health.
